summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VHF-SHF Path Profiler application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns correct VHF-SHF Path Profiler message
Backend API /api/bands returns all amateur radio bands (2m, 70cm, 21cm, 13cm, 3cm)
Backend API /api/calculate-path with valid locators returns distance, azimuth, elevation profile
Backend API /api/calculate-path correctly rejects invalid locators (422 error)
Backend API /api/calculate-path correctly rejects invalid bands (422 error)
Backend API /api/calculate-path correctly rejects missing fields (422 error)
Frontend loads with tactical dark theme correctly
Locator input validation working (JN18DQ format accepted)
Antenna height inputs accept numeric values (0-1000m range)
Band selector displays amateur radio bands and allows selection
Calculate button triggers API call and displays results
Metrics display shows distance (19.51km), azimuth (341.8°/161.7°), status (OBSTRUCTED)
Terrain profile chart renders correctly with Plotly.js (green terrain, red LoS line, obstruction marker)
Status indicator correctly shows CLEAR/OBSTRUCTED with color coding
localStorage persistence maintains form values across page reloads
Toast notifications display calculation results appropriately

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor Plotly detection issue in test script only)
